step_3_faqs.question: There's a lot of information — I don't know where to start!
step_3_faqs.answer_template: Start in the Classroom. Head to the Classroom tab — this is where you'll find all the courses, meditations, and live Zooms. Begin with whatever module feels most aligned with what you're currently calling in. Follow What You're Drawn To — there's no wrong place to begin. This work meets you exactly where you are. Trust Your Higher Self — simply start where your curiosity or excitement points you.

step_3_faqs.question: Is there any particular order I should consume content in?
step_3_faqs.answer_template: Not necessarily. The community is designed for self-paced transformation — you can follow your intuition and start where you feel most drawn. However, if you're new, we recommend starting with the foundational module in the Classroom.

step_3_faqs.question: Are the events recorded?
step_3_faqs.answer_template: Yes! Every live event — including group coaching, interviews, and retreats — is recorded and uploaded inside the Events or Classroom tab. You'll never miss out, even if you can't attend live.

step_3_faqs.question: How do I make sure I don't miss an event?
step_3_faqs.answer_template: Check the Events tab regularly. RSVP to any upcoming sessions you want to join — this activates reminders. Add them to your personal calendar with one click.

step_3_faqs.question: How do I level up in the community?
step_3_faqs.answer_template: You level up by engaging — liking posts, commenting, sharing wins, and helping others. Each interaction earns you points that move you through the levels. As you rise, you'll unlock exclusive content, perks, and even signed books and retreat access at higher levels.

step_3_faqs.question: Can I promote my own stuff?
step_3_faqs.answer_template: We love creators — but to keep the energy and focus aligned, self-promotion isn't allowed in posts or comments. You're welcome to connect and collaborate organically, but please keep the space free from external promotions so it remains a safe environment for everyone's growth.

step_3_faqs.question: Why can't I start more chats?
step_3_faqs.answer_template: Skool allows each member to start 10 new chats per week. This is intentional — it encourages members to connect through the community posts instead of private DMs, creating more open discussions and protecting everyone from spam. Once the week resets, your chat limit will too.
